raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I made a reservation directly through the XXXX XXXX XXXX official website for the dates of XXXX XXXX XXXX. The reservation total was {$2000.00}, which was billed to my American Express. Per the cancellation policy displayed on the hotels website, I was entitled to a full refund if I canceled prior to XX/XX/year>. 

Due to my wifes illness, I called the XXXX XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>, to cancel the reservation. During that call, I was informedshockinglythat the reservation had allegedly already been canceled either on the same day I booked or the day immediately thereafter. This was not done by me nor by my wife. To make matters worse, I was ultimately advised that the hotel had refunded about {$1900.00} amount to a third party who is neither myself nor my American Express account. 

I do not understand how this could have occurred. The payment was made directly by me, and any refundwhether partial or fullshould have been returned only to my original form of payment. This incident represents a serious breach of proper financial and customer service protocols. 

I spoke extensively with hotel staff, including XXXX XXXX and then XXXX as apparently, the hotel uses XXXX, and several other representatives. Initially, there was verbal acknowledgment from XXXX XXXX that I would receive a refund ; however, the hotel ultimately refused to take corrective action and chose to do nothing. 

On XX/XX/year>, I contacted American Express via online chat to dispute the charge. On XX/XX/year>, I was informed that my dispute had been denied. When I called to escalate the matter, I was refused the opportunity to speak with a person in authority. I subsequently communicated via online chat with XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX, and was told that because a partial refund had been issuedalbeit to an unknown third partyAmerican Express would take no further action. 

I find this outcome absolutely unacceptable. This is not only a failure of customer service but a complete disregard for proper business conduct, security, and consumer rights. The handling of this matter, by both the XXXX XXXX XXXX and American Express, falls far below any reasonable standard, and I request immediate corrective action to ensure the full refund is issued directly to me without further delay.
